content.en:
"Senior Brother Pengyu, I don't know how you can trade this chaotic magic power for me three thousand thunderbolts?"

Ye Tian asked.

Peng Yu Tianjun said: "Daozi, ordinary treasures are of little use to me, Daozi is only a god general now, and there are probably no treasures on his body that are useful to me, if I exchange a bunch of useless things for the inheritance of Chaos Divine Power, then I am not willing." The inheritance of Chaos Divine Power is difficult to copy, after all, it is necessary to practice Chaos Divine Power, and reach a strong person above Dacheng, plus special materials to inherit, this alone is enough to prove the value of Chaos Divine Power. Moreover, the Chaos Divine Power is only allowed to be passed on a few times at most, and although the Chaos Divine Power Inheritance in my hand can only be passed on one more time, if it is traded to someone who needs it, it is enough to exchange for a large amount of resources. Therefore, if Daozi wants to trade the three thousand thunder chaos supernatural powers in my hand, he can only use the Void Heaven Points. "

"Void Sky Points?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

Peng Yu Tianjun explained: "Void Heaven Points are a kind of points owned by the disciples of the Void Heaven First Lineage, which can be used to exchange resources. Daozi is the ancestor of the Dao, and you can have 10,000 points when you get started, but Daozi has not yet entered the Void Heaven Realm, so he has no points in his hand. But I have already received the news, and when the next batch of Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs enter the Great Universe, the large army of the Void Heaven One Pulse will also come in. At that time, the Void Heaven Points System will also be opened in the Great Universe, and Daozi will also have points at that time. Three thousand thunderbolts are this chaotic supernatural power, and I want to sell 3,000 points. "

"3000 points!"

Although Ye Tian didn't know what the value was, he was the ancestor of the Dao, and Peng Yu Tianjun should not dare to fool him, otherwise if he showed his stuffing in the future, it would be tantamount to offending him.

Therefore, Ye Tian agreed.

"Okay, then 3000 points, but I don't have any points now, we can only sign an agreement, how about it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Good!"

Peng Yu Tianjun nodded.

In fact, he really didn't earn more Ye Tian points, after all, with the grade of three thousand thunderous powers, it was definitely worth 3,500 points, and he sold 3,000 points very cheaply.

But the key problem is that no one is willing to spend so many Void Sky Points to buy 3,000 thunderbolts!

Because the Chaos Divine Power is difficult to practice, and the cultivation conditions of the Three Thousand Thunder Movements are also very harsh, the average Heavenly Monarch will not waste points to buy the Three Thousand Thunder Movements, and the Heavenly Monarchs who can really afford it will not care about the Three Thousand Thunder Movements, after all, they will buy the Chaos Divine Power that is more suitable for them.

In the Void Heaven Realm, there are a lot of Chaos Divine Powers, as long as you have points, you can buy Chaos Divine Powers.

Because of this, the three thousand thunder chaos divine power inheritance in his hand has not been sold, and now that Ye Tian wants to buy it, he is naturally willing.

Immediately, Pengyu Tianjun signed an agreement with Ye Tian.

Pengyu Tianjun is not afraid of Ye Tian's debts, not to mention that he is bound by a contract, even if he is not bound by a contract, with the identity of Dao Ancestor, he really doesn't care about 3,000 Void Heaven Points in the future.

After signing the agreement, Ye Tian also obtained three thousand thunderous powers.

With the Chaos Divine Power in hand, Ye Tian needs to collect the Thunder Innate Origin Thing next, and it must be a high-level Thunder Innate Origin Thing, and the low-level Innate Origin Thing is useless.

Some top-notch supernatural powers may be able to use low-level innate origin things, but the chaos supernatural powers are far beyond the superpowers, and they can't practice the chaos supernatural powers at all without high-level innate origin things.

"The high-grade thunder is an innate origin thing, which is a little difficult to collect!"

Ye Tian asked many people in the Void Heaven Palace, none of them had such a high-level thunder-level innate origin thing on them, maybe someone had it, but he didn't want to take it out, he couldn't help it.

Moreover, the innate origin of the high-grade thunder system is also very valuable, maybe not as good as the Chaos Divine Power inheritance, but it is not much worse.

If Ye Tian wanted to follow the endless path and condense countless rudiments of the Great Dao, he had to collect a large number of Chaos Divine Powers, and the price he paid was definitely beyond the imagination of others.

"In the future, we still have to rely on the Void Heaven One Pulse, but it will take a long time for the next group of people to enter the Great Universe, and we can only rely on ourselves to collect them slowly during this time!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the next few thousand years, Ye Tian still did not collect the innate origin of the high-level thunder system, but he collected a great divine power, and it was also one of the three thousand great divine powers, ranking 100th among the three thousand great divine powers.

The ranking of the great god arithmetic is very terrifying, because it can deduce fate, deduce exercises, and deduce good luck and evil, which can be called a great supernatural power that is extremely against the sky, and some people even list it as the top ten of great supernatural powers.

But in the end, it was ranked in the 100th place of the Great Divine Power, and the reason why it was ranked last in the top 100 was because it was almost difficult to practice, if it weren't for the fact that the Great Divine Power Inheritance and Manufacturing was relatively simple, it was not as good as the Chaos Divine Power, otherwise no one would be able to forge this Divine Power Inheritance at all.

It is said that from ancient times to the present, no one has been able to cultivate it to the realm of Dacheng, and in this era, no one has been able to cultivate it.

Because if you want to cultivate the Great God Arithmetic, you need the Divine Arithmetic Talent after the fusion of the two god-level talents of Destiny Talent and Deduction Talent, and this step hinders others.

It is rumored that in the past, there was an Arcana in the Chaos that could fuse the Destiny Talent and the Deduction Talent into a Divine Calculation Talent, but now that Arcana is gone, and it can no longer be born.

In addition to the divine arithmetic talent and the inheritance of the great god's arithmetic, two innate origin things are also needed, one is the destiny stone, and the other is the chaotic Xuan tortoise shell.

The Destiny Stone is not rare, it is not difficult to collect, only the Chaos Xuan Tortoise Shell is a little difficult to do, because the Chaos Xuan Tortoise Shell is a unique tortoise shell of the Chaos Xuan Tortoise clan, and the Chaos Xuan Tortoise is a Chaos Life, and it is a high-level Chaos Life, and when you become an adult, you can become a peak powerhouse of the Mandate of Heaven, and some of the Chaos Turtles with high talent can become true ancestors.

If it weren't for the fact that the Chaos Xuan Tortoise clan didn't have a Dao Ancestor, no one would dare to collect the Chaos Xuan Tortoise Shell.

But even so, the Chaos Turtle Clan has a bunch of True Ancestors, plus they are good at deduction techniques, although they are far inferior to the Great God Arithmetic, but no one dares to provoke the Chaos Turtle Clan.

Ye Tian collected the Great God Arithmetic, collected the Destiny Stone, and even used the Copying Talent to fuse the Destiny Talent and the Deduction Talent into the Divine Arithmetic Talent.

It can be said that Ye Tian only needs to collect the Chaos Xuan Tortoise Shell before he can officially cultivate that great god arithmetic.

To a certain extent, the Great God Arithmetic is even more awesome than the Chaos Divine Power, and Ye Tian is naturally looking forward to it.

It's a pity that he has collected it for a long time, but he has not found the Chaos Xuan Tortoise Shell.

this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating, and an invitation was sent to him.

"The Yunzi Priestess invited me as a guest?"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

But after reading the content of the invitation, he immediately went to the banquet.
